name: telegram
description: Send Telegram bot messages and inspect recent chat updates from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Send bot alerts and inspect chat updates
interface.longDescription: Use Telegram Bot API helpers to send messages, confirm chat IDs, and wire simple Telegram notifications into local Codex workflows.
defaultPrompt: Send a Telegram test message to my default chat
Show recent bot updates so I can find the chat ID
Draft a short alert and send it via Telegram
